title: SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC - 211info
text: SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive medical care, such as well baby checkups, routine exams and physicals, same day sick child appointments, and immunizations. 700 SW Ramsey Avenue Suite 204 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm (541) 955-5683 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 955-5683 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP Open Card, AllCare CCO, and most private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for income-eligible families. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Childhood Immunization Pediatrics Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK DROP SITE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CARE COORDINATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
